posts.author: dagsoderlund (Dag)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the widget preferences, we would like a notification setting for when the number displayed in the widget meets a specific criteria. I.e. drops below a number.

What are you trying to achieve

We have a dashboard number widget counting the number of tasks with a to-do status in a board. We would like to be notified when that number drops below 10.

Another example is our numbers widget for counting tasks with the flow status “Blocked”. We would like to get notified when this exceeds 5.
